description_long: This is a metallic vase with a modern, industrial aesthetic, featuring a smooth, slightly tapered body that widens at the top and narrows toward a rounded base. The surface is predominantly a matte, weathered gray metal with visible patches of subtle rust and wear, giving it an aged, urban look. One side of the vase is adorned with a cluster of raised, interlocking gear motifs, adding a steampunk-inspired decorative element. The gears are three-dimensional and appear to be welded or attached to the main body, providing both visual and tactile contrast. The interior of the vase is plain and metallic, consistent with the exterior finish. The overall form is elegant yet robust, making it suitable for display in contemporary urban environments.
description: A weathered metallic vase with a matte gray finish and decorative raised gears on one side, blending industrial and steampunk styles.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plain, smooth metallic surface with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated, this view reveals the edge of the gear decorations beginning to appear on the right side.
description_view_2: This view highlights the cluster of raised gears prominently displayed on the vase's surface.
description_view_3: The gears are partially visible on the left, with the rest of the vase's surface remaining plain and metallic.
